'''Imina''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who was trained by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Marspa]]. Marspa answered Imina's question as to why [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] could intervene to prevent domestic violence on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] but not [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] with the answer: "For a Jedi to interfere with a culture on their homeworld would have been to pass judgment on them on behaIf of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]."
